name: Amaran T2C RGB LED Tube Light
description: This T2C RGB LED Tube Light from amaran is an innovative 2' tube featuring RGBWW output, an adjustable 2500-7500K color temperature, and creative color control for a range of looks and lighting effects.

features.Key Features:: For Photo & Video Enthusiasts | Output: 475 Lux at 3.3' (5600K) | 2500-7500K CCT; RGB Mode | Onboard, DMX & App Control | CRI 95 | TLCI 98 | CQS 96 | 46 Preset Color Gels, 15 Built-In FX | Swappable & Rechargeable Battery Handle | NATO Rail, 1/4"-20 & 3/8"-16 Mounting | Works with Optional USB-C to DMX Cable | Includes AC Adapter, Battery Grip & Bag
features.What’s in the box?: amaran T2C RGB LED Tube Light (2') | Tube Battery Grip | AC Power Supply | AC Power Cable | 3/8"-16 Eyebolt | Carry Case | Limited 1-Year Warranty, 2-Year Extension with Registration | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Registration Extension: 1-Year
